title: Senior Fleet Manager at Snapdeal Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Snapdeal Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Snapdeal Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Snapdeal Logistics:
Snapdeal Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Logistics!
